titleStmt.title: SII 23.479: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 479. (A.R. No. 479 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Ōṅkārēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 25: 1203 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription states that it begins with the introduction Puyalvāyttu maṇ vaḷara, etc., and proceeds with the appellation ‘who took Madurai, Īḻam and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. The details of the date are given as Makara, pañchamī, Saturday, Uttiram (=A.D., 1203, January 4, the paksha being bahuḷa). This is incomplete. It seems to record the exemption granted by the Mahā-sabhā of village Kuṟṟālamuḍaiyāṉ-Brahmadēśam in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu, a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśoḻa-vaḷanāḍu, on some lands endowed as ūrkīḻiṟaiyili by Piḷḷai Jayadarappallavaraiyar to the temple of Ōṅkārīśvaramuḍaiyār founded by him on the north bank of the village-tank. Reference is made to a land purchased from him by the Sabhā for pasture of the cattle and to another piece granted to them free by the same chief.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
haraḥ—svastiśrī . puyal vāyttu maṇ vaḷara Eṉṟa pāṭṭeḻuti tiri puvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5Āvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pakṣattu pañcamiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttarattu nā[ḷ jayaṅko]ṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuttūr nāṭṭu Akaram śrīkuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ brahmatecattu mahāsabhaiyār Eḻuttu . nam mūrkkumelai Ūrkkuḷattu vaṭakaraiyil piḷḷai jayatarappallavarayar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār Oṅkāriśvaramuṭaiyār koyil tevarkaṉmi yum koyil kaṇakkaṉum kaṇṭu
Innāyaṉāṟku Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa śrītevivatikku kiḻakku kaṇa vativāykkālukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭumā nikki Inna nilam Orumā Itil vaṭakkiṭṭu vāy Āṟukalliṉa nilam muntirikai nikki niṉṟa muk kāṇi muntirikai Itil meṟkaṭaiya mañcaḷvāy Āṟukalliṉa nilat tukkut talaimāṟu Iṭṭa nilam Araikkāṇi kiḻaraiye muṉṟumā Araik kāṇi nikki Itaṉ kiḻakku nilam kāṇikkiḻ Āṟumā mukkāṇi Araik kāṇiyum Iṅke teṉ kaṇṭattu nilam Araimā muntirikai kiḻ mākāṇi
Itil vaṭakkaṭaiya śrīdevivati tuṭaṅki kiḻakku (no)nokki mantirattu Ejñamurttipaṭṭaṉ nilam Aṟutiyāka nirpāya Amaṉakaṉ vāykkāl nikkiṉa kuḻi patiṉeṉṟiṉāl nilam kiḻāṟumā muntirikai Araik kāṇi nīkki nilam Araimāva raiye nālumākkāṇi Araikkāṇi yum Āka Aḻivucāttuppaṭi nilam3man=takpama Innilam mukkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mākāṇiyum Ūrkkiḻiṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭum piḷḷai jayatarappallavaraiyar Ūrvilai koṇṭa Eṭṭāntarattuk kollai nilam Araimā muntirikaik kiḻorumā Itukku vaṭakkuk komaṭattu viratoṇa paṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkalum
ceṭṭapocaṉ śrīkṛṣṇapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkalum piṟāntūr Ejña murttipaṭṭa soma kāṭakayājiyār pakkalum tirupper dakṣiṇā murtti paṭṭaṉ pakkalum Āka Ivvaṉaivar pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu kollai nilam Iraṇṭu miraṇṭu māmukkāṇiyum Āka nilam Iru māvarai muntirikaikkiḻ muṉṟumāmukkāṇi yitil Ic jayatarappalla varaiyaṟ pakkal nāṅkaḷ vaṭameṟkaṭaiya Ūrāy vilaikoṇṭu gopra cāra bhūmiyākak koṇṭa nilam Araimā muntirikaikkiḻ Orumāvum Innila Araiy Ivar Eṅkaḷukku dāṉamākat tanta kuḻi pattiṉāl nilam kiḻāṟumākkāṇiyum ŪrkkuḷattuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.479 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
